recipes.name: Spaghetti Bolognese
recipes.instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package instructions. In a separate pan, sauté onion and garlic, add ground beef until browned, then add tomato sauce and simmer. Serve sauce over spaghetti.

recipes.name: Chicken Curry
recipes.instructions: Cook rice according to package instructions. In a pan, sauté onion, add chicken and cook until browned. Add curry powder and coconut milk, simmer until chicken is cooked through. Serve over rice.
